# Published ruleset copies (do not edit here)

These are **served copies** of the authoritative plain-language specs that live in
the repository root. They are published under `webapp/rulesets/` only so the static
site can serve them for viewing/download from the *Maintain rules* page.

**Edit the originals in the repo root, not these copies.** `deploy.sh` refreshes
this folder from the root files on every deploy (see `sync_docs` in `deploy.sh`),
so any manual edit here is overwritten.

| Served copy | Authoritative source |
|---|---|
| `PAYG Ruleset.md` | `../../PAYG Ruleset.md` |
| `PAYG Form Questions.md` | `../../PAYG Form Questions.md` |
| `Objection Rights Ruleset.md` | `../../Objection Rights Ruleset.md` |
| `Objection Form Questions.md` | `../../Objection Form Questions.md` |
| `Capital Gains Tax Ruleset.md` | `../../Capital Gains Tax Ruleset.md` |
| `Capital Gains Tax Form Questions.md` | `../../Capital Gains Tax Form Questions.md` |
| `Negative Gearing Ruleset.md` | `../../Negative Gearing Ruleset.md` |
| `Negative Gearing Form Questions.md` | `../../Negative Gearing Form Questions.md` |
